zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Heilly於大約1240年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆漢姆時，她的父親Philippe DE CREQUY46歲，母親Alix DE PICQUIGNY41歲。她於1274年與Eudes de Ham結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1326年在她的家鄉享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle de Heilly于大约1240年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆漢姆时，她的父亲Philippe DE CREQUY46岁，母亲Alix DE PICQUIGNY41岁。她于1274年与Eudes de Ham结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1326年在她的家乡享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Heilly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brennan, Brigid, Ciaran, Conor, Kieran, Aidan, Aileen, Caitlin, Clancy, Colm, Conn.

variants.name: Reiley
meanings: Altered form of German Reile or of Reihle, avariant of Reil 2, 3.

variants.name: O'Reilly
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Mairead, Aidan, Colm, Declan, Dermot, Dympna, Eamon, Finbar, Brennan, Brian Patrick, Brid.

Irish (Cavan, Meath): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Raghailligh ‘descendant of Raghailleach’, Old Irish Roghallach, a personal name of unexplained etymology. This is the name of a chieftain family in County Cavan, related to the O'Rourkes. In Anglicized form it has also been confused with Ó Raithile found in Munster, usually Anglicized as O'Rahilly.

variants.name: Rahilly
meanings: Irish (Kerry and Cork): perhaps from Ó Raghailligh (see Reilly ), but more likely from the surname Ó Raithile ‘descendant of Raithile’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. This surname is common in Munster, where it is also Anglicized as O'Rahilly.

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Heilly was born about 1240, in Ham, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Philippe DE CREQUY, was 46 and her mother, Alix DE PICQUIGNY, was 41. She married Eudes de Ham in 1274. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1326, in her hometown, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Heilly est née environ 1240, à Ham, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Philippe DE CREQUY, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Alix DE PICQUIGNY, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Eudes de Ham en 1274. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1326, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Heilly um 1240 in Ham, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philippe DE CREQUY 46 und ihre Mutter Alix DE PICQUIGNY 41. Sie hat 1274 Eudes de Ham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1326 im Alter von 87 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Heilly è nata il circa 1240 nel Ham, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Philippe DE CREQUY, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Alix DE PICQUIGNY, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Eudes de Ham nel 1274. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1326, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Heillyが約1240年にフランスピカーディソンメハムで生まれた時，父Philippe DE CREQUYは46歳，母Alix DE PICQUIGNYは41歳であった。1274年にEudes de Hamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1326年に故郷で87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Heilly(이)가 대략 1240년 프랑스 피카디 솜 함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philippe DE CREQUY(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix DE PICQUIGNY(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1274년 Eudes de Ham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 그녀의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Heilly nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Ham, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Philippe DE CREQUY, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Alix DE PICQUIGNY, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Eudes de Ham em 1274. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1326, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Heilly родилась около 1240 г. в местности хам, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Philippe DE CREQUY было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix DE PICQUIGNY, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eudes de Ham в 1274 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1326 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de Heilly nació aproximadamente 1240, en Ham, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Philippe DE CREQUY, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Alix DE PICQUIGNY, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Eudes de Ham en 1274. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1326, en su pueblo, a la edad de 87 años.
